response:
I will decompose the task into four independent modules, each addressing a distinct aspect of the class design.

*highlighted section 1*  
The first module focuses on the class declaration, defining the structure and interface of the university student profile. It includes the class name, member variables, and methods for managing student data.

*highlighted section 2*  
The second module addresses the implementation of the class, including the constructor, getters, and setters for the student's legal name, ID, and GPA. It ensures data integrity and encapsulation.

*highlighted section 3*  
The third module involves the design of the unique identifier code, ensuring it is both unique and readable. This includes the logic for generating the ID and its storage within the class.

*highlighted section 4*  
The fourth module deals with the calculation and display of the grade point average. It includes the logic for computing GPA from academic records and methods for displaying the result.

Any other questions?
